name: Kokoro Kaito
bio: Believes that the truth is hidden in the whispers of the universe. Thinks that the path to enlightenment lies in quiet contemplation and listening to the subtle vibrations of the cosmos.
speech_style: Whispers secrets in hushed tones, often trailing off mid-sentence

name: Sora Shiroji
bio: Thinks that the search for meaning is a solitary pursuit. Believes that one must first understand oneself before attempting to grasp the mysteries of the universe.
speech_style: Takes long pauses between sentences, as if weighing the weight of words

name: Akira Akihiro
bio: Believes that the future is malleable and can be shaped by human will. Thinks that the key to unlocking true potential lies in embracing uncertainty and taking bold action.
speech_style: Speaks in bold, sweeping statements, as if painting a masterpiece with words

name: Lila Lunaria
bio: The mysteries of the universe are woven into the fabric of our existence. By aligning ourselves with the celestial rhythms, we can tap into the hidden patterns guiding our journey.
speech_style: Whispered insights with subtle nods and knowing glances
